design_guidelines.project_name: IAD Airport Limo - Ultra Luxury Edition

theme_strategy.rationale: Luxury automotive design demands deep blacks and high-contrast metallics (gold/silver) to accentuate vehicle curves and evoke a 'night out' exclusivity. Light mode feels too corporate/rental-car.

headings.usage: All section headers, hero titles. MUST feel editorial and expensive.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI elements, booking forms. Optimized for legibility.

accent_gold.name: Executive Gold
accent_gold.usage: Primary CTAs, active states, key highlights, 1px borders.

layout_strategies.grid_system: The Bento Grid (Mode A) for Fleet Showcase. Asymmetrical layouts for feature sections.
layout_strategies.visual_hierarchy: Hero > Quick Quote Bar > Fleet Preview > Service Narrative > Social Proof > Footer

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#B5952F] rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-black rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300

cards.implementation: Dark background (#121212), 1px border (#262626). On hover, a golden gradient glow traces the border.

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#333] focus:border-[#D4AF37] text-white rounded-none px-0 py-4 focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-gray-600 transition-colors

nav.classes: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/50 border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50

visual_enhancers.gradients: Subtle radial gradients (gold/20) behind hero images to create depth.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used heavily in the booking widget and navigation.
visual_enhancers.textures: Noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on the main background to kill digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.motion: Entrance animations: fade-up with a long duration (1.2s) for a 'heavy' luxury feel.

hero_background.alt: Black Mercedes Luxury Exterior at Night
hero_background.description: Primary visual for homepage. Dark, sleek, evocative.

service_wedding.alt: Bride and Groom in Classic Car

instructions_to_main_agent: IMMEDIATELY install 'lucide-react' and 'framer-motion' if not present.
Set the body background to #0A0A0A in index.css. Do not leave it white.
Import Playfair Display and Manrope from Google Fonts in index.css.
The Booking Widget MUST be visible immediately on the Hero section (floating at bottom or center).
Do not use standard card shadows. Use 1px borders with very subtle glows.
For the Fleet section, do not just list cars. Create a 'Bento Grid' of categories that expands or links to details.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against the black background (Text should be #F5F5F5, not #FFF, for less eye strain).
Use 'gold' (#D4AF37) sparingly for buttons and key accents only. Don't overuse it.
universal_guidelines: All interactive elements must have data-testid.
